name: Compound Interest Calculator
description: Industrial-grade compound interest calculator with lean and six sigma principles for financial forecasting and investment analysis.

inputs.label: Principal Amount
inputs.businessContext: Initial investment or loan amount in base currency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial investment or loan amount in base currency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Başlangıç yatırımı veya kredi tutarı (temel para birimi cinsinden).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Investissement initial ou montant du prêt dans la devise de base.
businessContext_i18n.es: Inversión inicial o monto del préstamo en moneda base.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الاستثمار الأولي أو مبلغ القرض بالعملة الأساسية.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Nominal annual interest rate as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal annual interest rate as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'intérêt nominal annuel en pourcentage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de interés nominal anual como porcentaje.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل الفائدة السنوي الاسمي كنسبة مئوية.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of compounding periods per year (e.g., 1=annual, 12=monthly, 365=daily).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of compounding periods per year (e.g., 1=annual, 12=monthly, 365=daily).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Zinsperioden pro Jahr (z. B. 1=jährlich, 12=monatlich, 365=täglich).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de périodes de capitalisation par an (ex. : 1=annuel, 12=mensuel, 365=quotidien).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de períodos de capitalización por año (ej., 1=anual, 12=mensual, 365=diario).

inputs.label: Time Period
inputs.businessContext: Total duration of investment or loan in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total duration of investment or loan in years.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırım veya kredinin toplam süresi (yıl olarak).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtdauer der Anlage oder des Darlehens in Jahren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée totale de l'investissement ou du prêt en années.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración total de la inversión o préstamo en años.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المدة الإجمالية للاستثمار أو القرض بالسنوات.

inputs.label: Additional Contribution per Period
inputs.businessContext: Fixed amount added at the end of each compounding period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed amount added at the end of each compounding period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bileşik döneminin sonunda eklenen sabit tutar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fester Betrag, der am Ende jeder Zinsperiode hinzugefügt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant fixe ajouté à la fin de chaque période de capitalisation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad fija añadida al final de cada período de capitalización.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مبلغ ثابت يضاف في نهاية كل فترة تركيب.

inputs.label: Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation rate for real value adjustment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual inflation rate for real value adjustment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Reel değer ayarlaması için beklenen yıllık enflasyon oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Inflationsrate für die reale Wertanpassung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'inflation annuel attendu pour l'ajustement de la valeur réelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de inflación anual esperada para el ajuste del valor real.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل التضخم السنوي المتوقع لتعديل القيمة الحقيقية.

inputs.label: Tax Rate on Interest
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of interest earnings taxed annually.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of interest earnings taxed annually.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık olarak vergilendirilen faiz kazancının yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Zinserträge, der jährlich besteuert wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage des gains d'intérêts imposé annuellement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de ganancias por intereses gravado anualmente.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة أرباح الفائدة الخاضعة للضريبة سنويًا.

rules.message: Principal must be greater than zero.
Annual interest rate cannot be negative.
Time period must be greater than zero.
Compounding frequency must be between 1 and 365.

thresholds.message: Interest rate exceeds typical market rates; verify input.
Long-term projection beyond 30 years may have reduced accuracy.
Inflation rate is unusually high; consider economic context.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
